allow: PowerShell(foreach \($t in 'bun','cargo','rustc','node','npm'\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "{0,-6} {1}" -f $t, \(& $t --version 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1\) } else { "{0,-6} NOT FOUND" -f $t } })
PowerShell(sc.exe stop windivert 2>&1 | Out-String; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; sc.exe delete windivert 2>&1 | Out-String; "---"; sc.exe query windivert 2>&1 | Out-String)
